title: oxytropis campestris var. jordalii
intro: Oxytropis campestris var. jordalii, also known as Jordal's mountain milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, derived from its alkaloid compounds. The health benefits of Jordal's mountain milkvetch include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing its roots and leaves to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
